_publications._publicationTitle: Burden of adult neurofibromatosis 1: development and validation of a burden assessment tool

_contextSnippet: In our patient cohort, the mean BoN score obtained was 28.42 (±16.87), the mean score for men being 22.48 (±16.47) versus 31.67 (±16.38) for women ( p  < 0.001).
details: Mean BoN score was 28.42 (±16.87), with men scoring 22.48 (±16.47) versus women 31.67 (±16.38) (p<0.001)
